prompt: This document is to be published on the UK GOV.UK government website. It may apply to one or more of the nations of the UK (England, Wales, Scotland or Northern Ireland). State whether it applies to scotland and give a short explanation (less than 100 words) for your decision.
reason: The document pertains specifically to the operational structure and statistics of the HM Prison and Probation Service (HMPPS) in England and Wales. Scotland has its own distinct legal and penal system, running separate from HMPPS, hence the statistics and structure outlined do not apply to Scotland.
